conversations.title: Demo Project Planning
conversations.snippet: Can you help organize a small local reading group?

messages.author: user
messages.text: Can you help organize a small local reading group?

messages.author: assistant
messages.text: Sure. Start with a short theme, a simple schedule, and a shared list of discussion questions.

messages.author: user
messages.text: Make the plan easy to search later.

messages.author: assistant
messages.text: Use clear titles, dates, tags, and short summaries for each meeting note.

conversations.title: Demo Search Debugging
conversations.snippet: Why does my local search return too many results?

messages.author: user
messages.text: Why does my local search return too many results?

messages.author: assistant
messages.text: Check whether each query term is required, then tune the result scoring and snippets.
